title: 13 Lead Soldiers
writer: Herman C. McNeile, Dwight V. Babcock, Irving Elman
actors: Tom Conway, Maria Palmer, Helen Westcott
plot: Captain Hugh "Bulldog" Drummond is called in to solve the murder of a man from whom two lead soldiers were stolen. Drummond learns that the two soldiers were part of a set of thirteen which formed the key to a hidden vault of trea...
